name: tinysnb
description: TinySNB-style social network queries — based on upstream Kuzu test suite.

cases.name: create_person_knows
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, age INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))
CREATE REL TABLE Knows(FROM Person TO Person, since INT64)
cases.query: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.name

cases.name: one_hop_relationship
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, age INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))
CREATE REL TABLE Knows(FROM Person TO Person)
cases.query: MATCH (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person) RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name

cases.name: two_hop_path
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, PRIMARY KEY(name))
CREATE REL TABLE Knows(FROM Person TO Person)

cases.name: count_nodes
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, PRIMARY KEY(name))

cases.name: group_by_age
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, age INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))
cases.query: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.age, COUNT(*) AS cnt ORDER BY p.age

cases.name: where_gt_filter
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, age INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))
cases.query: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age > 25 RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.name

cases.name: distinct_values
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Tag(val STRING, PRIMARY KEY(val))
cases.query: MATCH (t:Tag) RETURN DISTINCT t.val ORDER BY t.val

cases.name: skip_limit
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE N(id INT64, PRIMARY KEY(id))
cases.query: MATCH (n:N) RETURN n.id ORDER BY n.id SKIP 1 LIMIT 3

cases.name: set_property
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, age INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))

cases.name: delete_node
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, PRIMARY KEY(name))
cases.query: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.name
